CREATE TABLE t (response_time Float64, weight Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY tuple();
SELECT quantilesTimingWeighted(0, 0.25, 0.75, 0.99)(response_time, weight) FROM (SELECT * FROM t) AS subquery;
CREATE TABLE t2 (response_time Float64, weight Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY response_time;
SELECT quantilesTimingWeighted(0.1, 0.5, 0.95)(response_time, weight) FROM t JOIN t2 ON t.response_time < t2.response_time;
CREATE TABLE t3 (response_time Float64, weight Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY tuple();
SELECT quantilesTimingWeighted(0.2, 0.6, 0.8)(response_time, weight) FROM (SELECT response_time, weight FROM t UNION ALL SELECT response_time, weight FROM t3);

SELECT quantilesTimingWeighted(0, 0.25, 0.5, 1)(response_time, weight) FROM (SELECT response_time, weight FROM t) AS first JOIN (SELECT response_time, weight FROM t2) AS second ON first.response_time = second.response_time;
